feature: Wave 2 self-expanding experimental financial data mesh

findings.title: Repair candidate manifest coercion could drop nested authority fields before activation
findings.description: repair_source coerced candidate_manifest to DeclarativeSourceManifest before activation, allowing unknown nested authority fields to be discarded before raw manifest rejection.

findings.title: Malformed manifests and fixtures could escape append-only failed-trial recording
findings.description: trial_manifest and the generic adapter parser could raise on malformed input instead of appending blocked or failed trial records with parser provenance.

findings.title: Secret-shaped keys could preserve secret values in audit payloads
findings.description: Secret detection and redaction focused on marker substrings in values, so api_key-like keys could leave their values visible.

findings.title: Generated connector audit could accept file, database, network, or dynamic-execution code
findings.description: The generated connector audit marker list did not cover common non-sandbox-safe capabilities, weakening the sandbox-only acceptance signal.

findings.title: Catalog CLI output exposes the local state_dir path
findings.description: FinancialDataMesh.catalog includes an absolute local state_dir path. This exposes local path metadata but no secrets and does not affect activation or production mutation boundaries.

tests_run.result: passed with exit code 0; 432 tests collected by python -m pytest --collect-only -q
